title: Provided
sourceTitle: Provided Subject Neon Circuit Cyberpunk Hoodie Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image photorealistic cinematic studio portrait of same adult subject from the uploaded reference from uploaded portrait reference before neon circuit hoodie transformation, rebuilt with a fixed neon-orange cyberpunk hoodie look. Subject: same adult subject from the uploaded reference remains the provided subject only, wearing dark cyberpunk-style hoodie completely covered with luminous neon-orange circuit board patterns and a glowing zipper detail, small round shutter-style sunglasses with bright orange-illuminated lenses, hands tucked in pockets, and angled three-quarter stance toward the right with head tilted slightly downward. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Three-quarter stance angled toward the right, hood pulled up, head tilted slightly downward, upper-body to full-figure portrait framing, centered enough to show the glowing zipper and circuit-board pattern clearly. Signature Elements: Preserved provided subject neon circuit cyberpunk hoodie portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic cyberpunk studio portrait with fixed visual style, sharp focus, luminous circuit-board fabric detail, realistic hoodie texture, and polished cinematic fashion finish. Color Palette: Deep black, charcoal hoodie fabric, vivid neon orange circuitry, burnt-orange background falloff, warm lens highlights, and restrained skin tones from the reference. Lighting: Strong directional studio lighting with vivid orange light falloff, glowing zipper illumination, orange-lit sunglasses, deep shadows, and crisp edge definition. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
